name: Lucia Caminos
description: One of the two main protagonists. Lucia is fierce, street-smart, and deeply protective of her loved ones. After serving a prison sentence, she returns to the neon-drenched streets of Leonida determined to secure a better life by any means necessary.

name: Jason Duval
description: The male co-protagonist of GTA 6. Partnered with Lucia, Jason brings heavy muscle, tactical gunplay, and precision driving to their crew. Though he seeks a quick road to wealth, he constantly finds himself pulled deeper into the dangerous cartel networks of Leonida.

name: Dre'Quan Priest
description: An aspiring music producer and partner at Only Raw Records. Dre'Quan represents the new wave of the Vice City scene, acting as a critical gateway to complex smuggling routes and street hierarchies.

name: Raul Bautista
description: A seasoned and veteran bank robber known for taking massive risks for legendary scores. Raul represents the old-school muscle of Vice City's cartel scene, commanding absolute respect through ruthless efficiency.

name: Cal Hampton
description: A rampant conspiracy theorist and longtime friend of Jason. Operating out of the shadows of the city's elite, Cal provides critical intelligence and shakedown opportunities to the team.

name: Real Dimez
description: The viral Florida rap duo taking Leonida by storm. Famous for their spicy tracks and social media antics, Bae-Luxe and Roxy leverage their massive digital following to aid the crew's operations.

name: Boobie Ike
description: A legendary racer on the Vice City street circuit and a prominent nightclub mogul. Boobie Ike knows every secret shortcut and alleyway in the city, controlling Leonida's high-speed night life.

name: Brian Heder
description: A veteran smuggler operating from the Florida Keys boatyards. Brian manages waterfront logistics and shakedowns, offering Jason a place to hide in exchange for muscle.

name: Stefanie
description: A dedicated prison counselor and correctional social worker. Stefanie oversees Lucia's parole transition, representing the fragile barrier between freedom and returning to the criminal underworld.
